title: croton moustiquensis
intro: Croton moustiquensis, also known as the mosquito tree, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include the presence of croton oil, a mixture of diterpene esters that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton moustiquensis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural insect repellent due to its high content of limonoids. Herbal preparations of Croton moustiquensis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used topically or taken internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
